eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Quay, NM; at 10:25 AM on JUN 29, 2026 Effective until 10:25 AM JUN 30, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Stay clear of the Quay Courthouse area due to police activity. The Courthouse is closed. Stay clear of the Quay Courthouse area due to police activity. The Courthouse is closed.
